items.title: I'tikaf Night Ramadan 1447H
items.author: Mosque Committee
items.excerpt: Join us for I'tikaf — an overnight spiritual retreat at the masjid during the final nights of Ramadan 1447H. Open to all brothers.

items.title: Ramadan Iftar Gathering 1447H
items.author: Mosque Committee
items.excerpt: Join us for a community iftar dinner during the blessed month of Ramadan. All Muslims and their families are warmly welcome to break fast together at the masjid.
